# MD Billing Experts

> Houston, Texas medical billing and revenue cycle management company serving independent physician practices across Texas. 20+ years of experience, 95% first-pass claim acceptance, AAPC-certified coders, eClinicalWorks Certified, HIPAA-compliant.

## About

MD Billing Experts is a privately-owned medical billing company headquartered in Houston, Texas. The company has served independent physician practices for 20+ years and currently works with 25+ practices across Texas. The company specializes in nine clinical specialties: internal medicine, pediatrics, cardiology, hospitalist, rehabilitation, senior living/SNF, pulmonary, geriatrics, and nephrology. Compliance commitments include HIPAA, AAPC certification for coders, and adherence to CMS LCDs (Texas Novitas), Medicare Advantage rules, and Texas Medicaid (TMHP) policy.

## Contact

- **Phone:** (832) 660-6657
- **Email:** contact@mdbillinghouston.com
- **Location:** Houston, Texas (service-area business; serves the Greater Houston metro and statewide Texas)
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central Time

## Services

- [Revenue Cycle Management](https://mdbillinghouston.com/services/revenue-cycle-management): End-to-end ownership of eligibility verification, charge entry, claim submission, ERA posting, AR follow-up, denial management, patient billing, and weekly KPI reporting.
- [Medical Coding](https://mdbillinghouston.com/services/medical-coding): AAPC-certified ICD-10 and CPT coding for nine specialties, with E/M leveling review and documentation feedback.
- [Provider Credentialing & Enrollment](https://mdbillinghouston.com/services/credentialing): CAQH setup, payer enrollment, hospital privileges paperwork, ongoing recredentialing maintenance.
- [AR & Denial Management](https://mdbillinghouston.com/services/ar-denial-management): Aged AR cleanup, denial root-cause analysis, appeal documentation, payer underpayment recovery.
- [Eligibility Verification](https://mdbillinghouston.com/services/eligibility-verification): Real-time benefits verification before every visit, plan-change tracking, prior auth management.
- [Patient Billing](https://mdbillinghouston.com/services/patient-billing): Branded statements, online payment portal, payment plans, friendly outreach calls.

## Specialties

- [Internal Medicine](https://mdbillinghouston.com/specialties/internal-medicine): E/M leveling, AWVs, CCM (99490), TCM (99495/99496).
- [Pediatrics](https://mdbillinghouston.com/specialties/pediatrics): Well-child visits, vaccine administration (CPT 90460/90461), THSteps Texas Medicaid.
- [Cardiology](https://mdbillinghouston.com/specialties/cardiology): Cardiac stress testing, echo, sleep studies, modifier 26/TC splits.
- [Hospitalist](https://mdbillinghouston.com/specialties/hospitalist): Inpatient subsequent care, observation, discharge billing, place-of-service accuracy.
- [Rehabilitation](https://mdbillinghouston.com/specialties/rehabilitation): Therapy plan-of-care signatures, KX modifiers, Medicare therapy thresholds.
- [Senior Living / SNF](https://mdbillinghouston.com/specialties/senior-living): SNF nursing facility codes, monthly rounds billing, hospice consolidated billing.
- [Pulmonary](https://mdbillinghouston.com/specialties/pulmonary): PFTs, sleep studies, CPAP titration, bronchoscopy.
- [Geriatrics](https://mdbillinghouston.com/specialties/geriatrics): Frailty assessments, advance care planning (99497/99498), TCM and CCM.
- [Nephrology](https://mdbillinghouston.com/specialties/nephrology): Monthly capitation MCP codes (90951–90970), in-center vs home dialysis billing.

## Service Areas

- [Houston, TX](https://mdbillinghouston.com/houston): Headquarters and primary market. Texas Medical Center, Memorial, Galleria, Bellaire, West University, Heights, Spring Branch, Energy Corridor, Champions, Clear Lake, Kingwood.
- [Sugar Land, TX](https://mdbillinghouston.com/service-areas/sugar-land): Memorial Hermann Sugar Land, Houston Methodist Sugar Land, OakBend medical districts.
- [Katy, TX](https://mdbillinghouston.com/service-areas/katy): Memorial Hermann Katy, Houston Methodist West, Texas Children's West Campus.
- [The Woodlands, TX](https://mdbillinghouston.com/service-areas/the-woodlands): Memorial Hermann The Woodlands, Houston Methodist The Woodlands, Texas Children's The Woodlands.
- [Pearland, TX](https://mdbillinghouston.com/service-areas/pearland): HCA Houston Healthcare Pearland, Memorial Hermann Pearland.
- [Cypress, TX](https://mdbillinghouston.com/service-areas/cypress): HCA Houston Healthcare North Cypress, Memorial Hermann Cypress.
- [Spring, TX](https://mdbillinghouston.com/service-areas/spring): HCA Houston Healthcare Northwest, Memorial Hermann Northeast.

Beyond the Houston metro: Austin, San Antonio, Dallas–Fort Worth, the Rio Grande Valley, East Texas, West Texas, plus a handful of practices in Louisiana, Oklahoma, Arkansas, and New Mexico.

## Performance Benchmarks

- 95%+ first-pass claim acceptance
- 24–48 hour claim submission turnaround
- 32 days in AR average (industry target: under 40)
- 98%+ net collection rate
- 25+ active practice partners

## Pricing & Contracts

- Pricing is a percentage of collections; rate depends on specialty, claim volume, and scope.
- Quoted after a free Revenue Leakage Analysis.
- No setup fees on standard onboardings.
- Month-to-month after the first 90-day onboarding (no multi-year lock-in).
- Denied claims are not billed (we charge on collections, not submissions).

## Free Revenue Leakage Analysis

A one-page diagnostic report identifying three specific revenue leaks at the practice with dollar estimates. Delivered in 3 business days. No obligation, no sales pitch. Request at https://mdbillinghouston.com/revenue-leakage-analysis.

## Onboarding Process

90 days from sign to steady state.

- Days 1–14: Discovery and AR audit.
- Days 15–30: Parallel run with previous biller; backlog cleanup.
- Days 31–60: Full handoff and claim submission ownership.
- Days 61–90: Optimization, KPI baseline, weekly reporting cadence locked in.

Practices typically see no week-over-week dip in collections during transition because the parallel run avoids any submission gap.

## EMR/PM Systems Supported

eClinicalWorks (certified), Athenahealth, Epic, Cerner, NextGen, Kareo/Tebra, AdvancedMD, Medisoft, and 20+ other systems.

## Compliance

- HIPAA-compliant; signs Business Associate Agreement (BAA) with every practice.
- AAPC-certified coders.
- eClinicalWorks Certified.
- Follows CMS LCDs (Texas Novitas), Medicare Advantage plan rules, and Texas Medicaid (TMHP) policy.
- Quarterly internal audits; annual external audits.
